title: Student Essay Revision
text: Mia drafted her essay late at night because she wanted to finish before class. She revised the introduction carefully, but it still felt too general. When her teacher read the second version, he noticed that the argument had become much clearer.

title: Research Team Workflow
text: The research team collected forum posts from an online course, and the annotators reviewed each paragraph together. Although the raw text was noisy, they found clear discourse markers in many examples. As a result, the final analysis was more reliable.

title: Classroom Presentation
text: Lena presented the project to her classmates, and they asked several questions about coreference resolution. She answered them patiently because the model output was easy to visualize. After the discussion ended, the instructor praised the clarity of her demo.
